title: Just-In OCEAN
description: A new material tough as netherite
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec263ce4776343fb064196c7f094100c55f4016a.png)
The simple mod to add a material similiar to netherite,but it apear on sea bed of the deep ocean.

You need to dive in the ocean to find it.
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f204055780f47630eee3d098c4f50de6ab34104f.png)
New mob  "Sharkdrake" the apex predators of the sea, they swim at incredible speeds. Some rare individuals have shark fins. Weapons made from their fins can increase swimming speed.
![sharkdrake](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ed412c9a9fcbfc23a3c9955ff826125c567136d.png)

And you can use the waterspirit ingot and smithing template to upgrade the equipment.

More water spirit weapon with [Just-In CAVE](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-in-cave).
